<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="run_terminal_command_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: python -c "
import re
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime
p = Path(r'e:/\u6570\u5b57/vault/\u6570\u5b57\u5206\u8eab/\u5f85\u786e\u8ba4')
pat = re.compile(r'(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2})_(\d{2})-(\d{2})(?:-(\d{2}))?Z')
def sort_key(name):
    m = pat.search(name)
    if not m:
        return datetime.max
    d, h, mi, s = m.group(1), m.group(2), m.group(3), m.group(4) or '00'
    return datetime.strptime(f'{d} {h}:{mi}:{s}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
files = sorted([f for f in p.iterdir() if f.is_file()], key=lambda f: sort_key(f.name))
for f in files:
    print(f.name)
"</summary>

```bash
python -c "
import re
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime
p = Path(r'e:/\u6570\u5b57/vault/\u6570\u5b57\u5206\u8eab/\u5f85\u786e\u8ba4')
pat = re.compile(r'(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2})_(\d{2})-(\d{2})(?:-(\d{2}))?Z')
def sort_key(name):
    m = pat.search(name)
    if not m:
        return datetime.max
    d, h, mi, s = m.group(1), m.group(2), m.group(3), m.group(4) or '00'
    return datetime.strptime(f'{d} {h}:{mi}:{s}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
files = sorted([f for f in p.iterdir() if f.is_file()], key=lambda f: sort_key(f.name))
for f in files:
    print(f.name)
"
```

```bash
$script = @'
$files = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath ''E:\数字\vault\数字分身\待确认'' -File
$sorted = $files | Sort-Object {
  $n = $_.Name
  if ($n -match ''(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2})_(\d{2})-(\d{2})(?:-(\d{2}))?Z'') {
    $sec = if ($Matches[4]) { $Matches[4] } else { ''00'' }
    [datetime]::ParseExact($Matches[1] + '' '' + $Matches[2] + '':'' + $Matches[3] + '':'' + $sec, ''yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'', $null)
  } else { [datetime]::MaxValue }
}, Name
foreach ($f in $sorted) { $f.FullName }
'@
$b64 = [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($script))
powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -EncodedCommand $b64
```
